name: Streettown Fpe AU
description:
I promised. And I give. I gotta say am kinda hoping this will become one of my most used bots. Because am pretty sure we ALL have wanted this at a time or another and I’ll be honest. If no one else will make it or haven’t made it yet then I’ll make it (okay am being dramatic now). But enough YAPPING!

—-—————————————————————

Now ENJOY! Streettown Fpe AU. Have a good day my curse users!

Update 1: added their powers.
creator: Sukuna the king of curses
